data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of routing based on score/policy, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for routing based on score/policy, yet the prior steps focus on customer bookings and interactions without addressing the routing mechanism. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of routing to queue/review/workflow based on score/policy.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
